recommendations.title: Dead Man Down
recommendations.overview: In New York City, a crime lord's right-hand man is seduced by a woman seeking retribution.

recommendations.title: Violet & Daisy
recommendations.overview: Two teenage assassins accept what they think will be a quick-and-easy job, until an unexpected target throws them off their plan.

recommendations.title: Deathtrap
recommendations.overview: A Broadway playwright puts murder in his plan to take credit for a student's script.

recommendations.title: Keanu
recommendations.overview: Friends hatch a plot to retrieve a stolen cat by posing as drug dealers for a street gang.

recommendations.title: Mo' Money
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Crime, Romance, Thriller, Drama
recommendations.overview: Trying to get his act together, a con artist gets a job in a credit card company. He falls in love with a fellow employee, he steals a couple of cards, everything is going great. But soon, the chief of security drags him into the big leagues of crimi

recommendations.title: Tango & Cash
recommendations.overview: Ray Tango and Gabriel Cash are two successful narcotics detectives who can't stand each other. Crime lord Yves Perret, furious at the loss of income they have caused him, plots an elaborate revenge against them.

recommendations.title: Spree
recommendations.overview: Desperate for an online following, a rideshare driver has figured out a deadly plan to go viral and he will stop at nothing to get his five minutes of fame.

recommendations.title: Coin Heist
recommendations.overview: When a crisis threatens to destroy their high school, four teens hatch a daring plan to raise $10 million. Step one? Breaking into the U.S. Mint.

recommendations.title: Aftermath
recommendations.overview: Desperate to save their marriage, a young couple takes a deal to move into their dream home, but disturbing events reveal the house's troubled history.

recommendations.title: The Banker
recommendations.overview: In the 1960s, two entrepreneurs hatch an ingenious business plan to fight for housing integration—and equal access to the American Dream.
